chapter_engine: action / comic escalation shifting to genuine threat
conflict: Five untrained level-300 agents — raw power is both absurd and devastating when wielded without skill
consequence: Vel forced below budget; Dren wounded and invested; Sable learns by watching; incompetence at 300 is dangerous and getting less incompetent
must_land_beats: Comedy of untrained agents causing accidental destruction
The shift from funny to dangerous: raw power hurts regardless of skill
Vel forced to overspend — cracked ribs from a glancing hit
Dren's silo-shrapnel wound as collateral damage
Sable watching and learning rather than fighting

secondary_character_beats: Dren's injury is not heroic — he is hit by debris from an explosion nobody aimed, which is how civilians get hurt in ability crossfire
